case_title: THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO VS QX MANAGEMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT QX MANAGEMENT CORP.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT QX MANAGEMENT CORP. HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
